tasks.label: Start Database
tasks.command: docker start loppemarked-db || docker run -d --name loppemarked-db -e POSTGRES_DB=loppemarked -e POSTGRES_USER=loppemarked -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=changeme123 -p 5433:5432 postgres:16

tasks.label: Setup Database Schema
tasks.command: until docker exec loppemarked-db pg_isready -U loppemarked -d loppemarked >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && npm run db:setup --workspace=@loppemarked/api
